Tip of the day
The base chance to find most Chests is 1/250, which you can increase with better gear and tools.

Spectral hammer

Spectral hammer
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Tools
Value: 348
Keywords: Smithing hammer
Smithing tool
Spectral
Search
Keyword: 		Smithing
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

The sturdy bone handle feels light even with the thick ectoplasm head on the end of it, which feels squishy when it isn't being swung around and being used as a smithing tool.

The Spectral hammer item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Smithing lvl. 58.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

-50% Work efficiency While doing Smithing.
+2.5% Double rewards While doing Smithing.
While in Ghostly location.
+2% Double rewards While doing Smithing.
+10% No materials consumed While doing Smithing.
+5 Quality outcome While doing Smithing.
+1% Chance to find 1 Ectoplasm While doing Smithing.
While in Ghostly location.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft a spectral hammer

You bundle bone together to form a strong grip and work the ectoplasm into a block that you mold onto the end of the grip. Thus creating a thick hammer head for it.

Work bone and ectoplasm together to create a ghostly smithing tool.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft a spectral hammer Crafting lvl. 58 Needs Advanced Cursed Workshop service or better. 5x Bones
15x Ectoplasm		 1x Spectral hammer

XP 		Base
